skeletons.errorPersistInformation: If this persists, please check that CocktailBerry is running and you are in the same network!
skeletons.loadingDataDescription: Fetching data from backend, this should be quick ...
skeletons.gettingConfigurationDescription: Fetching data from backend for setup, this should be quick ...

handAdd.intro: To finish the cocktail, add these ingredients yourself.
handAdd.allDone: All ingredients have been added. This window will close shortly.

lockScreen.paymentMessage: Please put your card/chip to the scanner to access cocktails.

payment.holdCard: Hold your NFC card or tag near the reader to complete the payment
payment.scanNFCToAccess: Please scan your NFC card to access cocktails
payment.userNotFound: This NFC or card is not registered. Please register it or contact the owner.
payment.serviceUnavailable: Payment service is currently unavailable. Please contact the owner.

ingredients.name: Name
ingredients.deleteIngredient: Do you want to delete the Ingredient?

recipes.name: Name
recipes.enableAllRecipes: Do you want to enable all Recipes?
recipes.deleteRecipe: Do you want to delete the Recipe?
recipes.deleteExistingImage: Do you want to delete the existing user image?

bottles.adjustHeader: Adjust the fill level of the bottle, maximum is {{maximum}}

options.aboutText:
CocktailBerry Software Version {{version}} by Andre Wohnsland.
{{platform}}.
Using python version: {{pythonVersion}} with Web UI.
options.startInitializeBottles: Initialize bottles? This pumps the configured tube volume through each connected pump to fill empty tubes. Only run this when the tubes are empty and place a container under the outlets.
options.rebootTheSystem: Do you want to reboot the System?
options.shutdownTheSystem: Do you want to shutdown the System?
options.startCleaningProgram: Do you want to start the Cleaning Program?
options.useReversion: Should the pump flow be reverted? This will activate the reversion pin and change the flow direction. Ingredients flagged as 'never pump back' will be skipped.
options.updateTheSystem: Do you want to update the System?

update.title: Update CocktailBerry
update.selectHint: Select the version to update to. You can step to a version before a major update to migrate safely.
update.majorWarning: This is a major update and may contain breaking changes. Check the changelog first.

calibration.ingredientCalibrationTooltip: This will not change the pump settings, but multiply the volume flow at which the ingredient will be pumped during preparation.

scaleCalibration.notAvailable: Scale is not available. Please enable and configure a scale first.
scaleCalibration.tareInstruction: Remove everything from the scale and press Tare to zero it.
scaleCalibration.placeWeightInstruction: Place a known weight on the scale and enter its weight below.

data.resetTheData: Do you want to reset the data?

addons.deleteTheAddon: Do you want to delete the addon '{{addon}}'?
addons.updateTheAddon: Do you want to update the addon '{{addon}}'?

wifi.connectToWifi: Do you want to use the data to connect to WiFi {{selectedSsid}}?

password.passwordProtectedBy: This section is protected by the {{passwordName}} password.
password.nfcHint: Authorized personnel can scan their NFC tag instead.

issues.info: This issues are shown once after your backend was started and found this issues. You can dismiss them, they will not show again until a restart. It is still recommended to take care of them.
issues.systemPythonDeprecated: You System is using an older version of Python than needed in the future. You will not be able to do updates.
issues.noInternetConnection: You seem to have no internet connection, this will result in wrong time. Since you have the microservice activated, please consider adjusting time manually, otherwise send data is faulty!
issues.configSetToDefault: The faulty config was set the the default, please adjust it:
issues.paymentDisabled: The payment service was disabled because of a startup issue. Please check your configuration:

timeManager.adjustTimeConfirmation: Do you want to adjust system time to given data?

recipeCalculation.title: Recipe Calculator
recipeCalculation.confirmCalculation: This might take a while on large databases. Proceed?

restrictedMode.title: Restricted Mode
restrictedMode.message: Do you want to enable restricted mode? Only the cocktail maker will be accessible. You can still access configuration with the master password.

sumup.noReaders: No readers configured. Create one to get started.
sumup.deleteReader: Do you want to delete the reader '{{name}}'

waiter.title: Service Personnel Management
waiter.lockMessage: Please scan your NFC tag to log in as a service personnel.
waiter.nfcNotRegistered: Scanned NFC tag is not registered
waiter.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete the service personnel '{{name}}'? Existing logs will be preserved but associations are lost.
waiter.noWaiters: No waiters registered. Scan an NFC tag and register a service personnel to get started.

role.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete the role '{{name}}'?
role.noRoles: No roles defined yet. Create a role first to register service personnel.
role.createFirstHint: No roles defined yet. Switch to the Roles tab and create one before registering personnel.
